articles.title: BESS融資與銀行性趨勢 (全球)
keyPoints: 電網級儲能項目融資持續成長
保險公司和資產管理公司興趣增加
混合項目（太陽能+儲能）成為主流模式
articles.originalContent: BESS financing and bankability trends continue to evolve with grid-scale projects gaining momentum.

articles.title: 太陽能供應鏈動態 (全球)
keyPoints: 中國太陽能製造商擴展海外產能
美國對中國太陽能產品關稅影響持續
articles.originalContent: Solar supply chain dynamics continue to evolve with polysilicon price fluctuations and Chinese manufacturers expanding overseas.

articles.title: 電池法規實施進度 (歐洲)
keyPoints: 歐盟電池法規2023年生效，分階段實施至2027年
儲能開發商面臨合規挑戰
鋰離子電池回收要求提高
articles.originalContent: The EU Batteries Regulation came into force in 2023, with various stipulations becoming law over the next several years.

articles.title: 儲能成本持續下降 (全球)
keyPoints: 鋰離子電池成本持續下降
新技術（如液流電池）商業化加速
長期儲能(LDES)解決方案興起
articles.originalContent: Energy storage costs continue to decline with lithium-ion batteries and new technologies like flow batteries accelerating commercialization.
